text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After completing a training session, Yaeno
Muteki and I notice Bamboo Memory running by.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Bamboo. You seem to be in a hurry. Are you
going somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nope, I'm on patrol! There have been reports
lately of a student breaking curfew to run around
the school grounds.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
According to eyewitnesses, the culprit gives off a
bright white glow. That sounds pretty unusual, so
it shouldn't take me long to track them down!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The problem is that she's incredibly fast!
Apparently, as soon as someone spots her, she
vanishes in the blink of an eye!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure you're dealing with a student, and
not some manner of apparition?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
An apparition? Actually, you might be onto
something there...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But if we are dealing with an apparition, that's all the more reason to get this case closed! We'll have a school crisis on our hands if everyone's too scared to attend classes!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. There are many young and vulnerable
students here. If I don't look out for them, who
will?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm going to accompany Bamboo in her
pursuit of this spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite sure where this is all going, but at
least Yaeno Muteki seems eager to keep running.
choice_data_list: Find out who or what the culprit really is!

If you wait around here, they should come
running past at some point, right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Time to recommence my patrol! I don't care if it's
a ghost or who knows what—if something's
causing a disruption at school, it's getting no
mercy from me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time Yaeno Muteki spends running around
the school grounds with Bamboo Memory ends up
doubling as a good training session for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, I hear that they failed to locate any
kind of apparition, instead finding only an
Umamusume named Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Remarkable insight. Indeed, the culprit has been
circling the school buildings.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's set up a checkpoint right here and lie
in wait!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay with you. Should the spirit become unruly,
I will step in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the specter is a no-show, and only an
Umamusume named Agnes Tachyon makes an
appearance. At the very least, though, we avoid
any overexertion.
